title: Probability Distributions: PMF vs. PDF and Expectation
description: A flowchart illustrating the relationship between discrete/continuous random variables, their probability functions (PMF/PDF), and how mathematical expectation is calculated for each.
relationships: PMF defines probability for discrete variables
PDF defines probability density for continuous variables; area under curve gives probability
E[X] for discrete variables is calculated as sum of (x * P(X=x))
E[X] for continuous variables is calculated as integral of (x * f(x))
